title: JML Go Vac Cordless Vacuum Cleaner - Portable, Rechargeable Device for Car, Home, Kitchen and Garage, Lightweight, Compact Handheld with 2-in-1 Suction and Blower Function
features: DOUBLE DUTY DYNAMO - The hand held vacuum cordless can switch from vacuum to air blower in seconds. Clear leaves from patios, inflate pool toys, or blast dust from workspaces
POWER IN YOUR PALM - This car vacuum cleaner cordless delivers strong suction in a compact design. Tackle car seats, spills & tight corners with ease. No outlet needed with cordless convenience
CAR CLEANING CHAMPION - Elevate your interior car cleaner routine with specialised attachments. The slim nozzle reaches between seats while the brush tackles stubborn dirt on dashboards
GRAB & GO CLEANING - At just 1kg, this powerful cordless vacuum fits easily in your car boot or kitchen drawer. Always ready for quick cleanups, from workshop dust to cereal spills
SMART ACCESSORIES - Every car cleaning task sorted with four clever car accessories. The round blower nozzle inflates air beds, while the brush head lifts pet hair from upholstery effortlessly
description: Meet the Go Vac from JML - your versatile companion for quick clean-ups everywhere. This powerful handheld car vacuum doubles as a blower and inflator, making it ideal for tackling all sorts of tasks. Whether you're cleaning your car interior, inflating pool toys, or dealing with kitchen spills, its strong suction and compact design make every job effortless. Cordless and rechargeable, with handy attachments included, the Go Vac is always ready for action. Keep one in your car boot or kitchen drawer - you'll wonder how you managed without it.
